summary: Gruber directs readers to Dan Benjamin's Macworld news summary on Hivelogic, praising it as 'exemplary analysis' while teasing that he'll discuss two minor errors the next day. He also playfully notes Hivelogic's design feature that changes on reload, linking to Benjamin's own post about it.
key_points: Recommends Dan Benjamin's Macworld coverage as exemplary analysis
Teases a forthcoming discussion of two minor errors in Benjamin's summary
Highlights Hivelogic's dynamic design feature that rewards reloading the page
money_quotes: Tomorrow there will be a discussion regarding the two minor errors in his otherwise exemplary analysis.
key_insight: A brief endorsement of Dan Benjamin's Macworld analysis that showcases Gruber's characteristic blend of collegial praise and teasing nitpickery.
